channel.title: Developer Vault Podcast Queue
channel.description: Private queue of vault-curated podcast episodes for agentic engineering, tool stacks, and practitioner workflow signal.
channel.itunes:author: Developer Vault

item.title: 1. No Priors: Andrej Karpathy on Code Agents, AutoResearch, and the Loopy Era of AI
item.description: Curated episode on code agents, AutoResearch, and human roles in AI workflows. Source: https://podwise.ai/dashboard/episodes/7561847

item.title: 2. Latent Space: Why Anthropic Thinks AI Should Have Its Own Computer - Felix Rieseberg of Claude Cowork & Claude Code Desktop
item.description: Curated episode on Claude Cowork, Claude Code Desktop, skills, and desktop agents. Source: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/why-anthropic-thinks-ai-should-have-its-own-computer/id1674008350?i=1000755841623

item.title: 3. Unsupervised Learning with Jacob Effron: Ep 85: Has AI Infra Stabilized, FM Vibe Shift, & What's Next for Coding Agents
item.description: Curated episode on AI infrastructure, model-provider shifts, and coding agents. Source: https://pocketcasts.com/podcast/unsupervised-learning-with-jacob-effron/6f3babc0-91a4-013b-f31a-0acc26574db2/ep-85-has-ai-infra-stabilized-fm-vibe-shift-whats-next-for-coding-agents/600be088-6a60-4800-b9f2-3d1c67e65148

item.title: 4. The Joe Reis Show: Wes McKinney on AI Agents, The Mythical Agent Month, and His Wild AI Coding Setup
item.description: Curated episode on AI agents, agent-month framing, and a strong practitioner's coding setup. Source: https://wesmckinney.com/transcripts/2026-04-08-joe-reis-ai-agents-mythical-agent-month.html

item.title: 5. Lenny's Podcast: Head of Claude Code: What happens after coding is solved | Boris Cherny
item.description: Curated episode on Claude Code and how coding-agent workflows may change software work. Source: https://api.substack.com/feed/podcast/10845.rss

item.title: 6. Latent Space: Notion’s Token Town: 5 Rebuilds, 100+ Tools, MCP vs CLIs and the Software Factory Future — Simon Last & Sarah Sachs of Notion
item.description: Curated episode on Notion agents, evals, tool exposure, permissions, and software-factory workflow design. Source: https://pocketcasts.com/podcast/latent-space-the-ai-engineer-podcast/76358c70-95ec-013b-f332-0acc26574db2/notions-token-town-5-rebuilds-100-tools-mcp-vs-clis-and-the-software-factory-future-simon-last-sarah-sachs-of-notion/6172bbee-0518-4eb5-9b78-ad73a6176505

item.title: 7. AI & I: Claude Code Can Be Your Second Brain
item.description: Curated episode on Claude Code, Obsidian, local Markdown notes, and AI as a second-brain thinking partner. Source: https://tldl-pod.com/episode/1719789201_rss_fc74edb321

item.title: 8. Latent Space: The Age of Async Agents — Cognition's Walden Yan & OpenInspect's Cole Murray
item.description: Curated episode on async coding agents, agent evaluation and inspection, and the shift to long-running agent workflows. Source: https://www.latent.space/p/cognition
